title: Validated proteomics workflow manifest
description: Schema for workflow.yaml in the proteomics-pipeline registry.

id.description: Unique slug; must equal the folder name.

instrument_aliases.description: Lowercase substrings fuzzy-matched against detected instrument names.

version.description: Pinned version the acquire step installs.

path.description: Alternative: an absolute path (e.g. on HIVE) instead of downloading.

estimate_params.description: Estimate search parameters from the detected data type (instrument + acquisition) using known-good settings. Default. Set false only if you ship a validated params_file.

var_mods.description: Optional extra variable mods to enable during estimation, e.g. 'ox' for Ox(M). Off by default (DIA-NN: var mods don't help pure quant).

param_overrides.description: Validated SOP values to force on top of the estimate (e.g. {"--mass-acc": 8}). Tagged 'user-override' in the rationale.

params_file.description: Optional: a validated engine-native params file (relative to the workflow folder). If present it is used verbatim and overrides estimation.

extra_files.description: Other files to fetch (e.g. a FragPipe manifest template).
